send_workflow: Search or read the relevant message/thread first.
Draft the proposed message whenever possible.
Present recipients, cc, bcc, subject, thread context, body summary, attachments, and risks.
Require explicit human confirmation before send.
Call the send tool only after confirmation and scope review.

allow_only_if: user explicitly asks to send now
final recipient and content are shown
scope review allows gmail.send or equivalent

gmail_api_requirements: messages.send sends to recipients in To, Cc, and Bcc headers.
messages.send accepts a Message request body and returns a Message on success.
Raw Gmail API sends require MIME content encoded as base64URL; MCP tools may abstract this but the safety review must still check recipients and content.
